name: firecrawl
description: Firecrawl onboarding and routing for web data: search the web, scrape clean markdown, and interact with live pages via the Firecrawl CLI or API. Routes each request to the right path — live CLI work, app-code integration, web-powered deliverables, credentials, REST-only, or the keyless free tier — and deep-integrates with the pipeline: the general-web evidence engine for pubmed-research-note and comprehensive-review, intent-lock gating on deliverables, vault saves via vault-keeper.
